revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[1] (03:03): replace 'protocols.how_did_you_get_my_number' with 'coaching_philosophy.empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure' or 'analysis_directives.friction_resolution_speed'; the cited protocol does not apply to general transfer-fatigue comments. (2) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[2] (04:30): replace classification 'micro_trade' with a positive energy_match or rapport label; the schema definition of micro_trade (process-substitution for personal commitment) does not fit Meg's patience line. (3) INTERNAL INCONSISTENCY — trajectory_verdict.outcome_dispute flags the in-person appointment as a definitive button_up protocol violation, but cherry_pick_moments[5] correctly notes this may be a market variant. Align both sections: flag the format discrepancy as 'possible protocol violation pending market-format confirmation' rather than treating it as settled in one section and hedged in another. (4) MISSED VERIFY ITEMS — add two cherry_pick_moments: (a) ts 01:25 — roof_type_age verify item (required: true) was never asked; Google Maps compliment was the natural insertion point; (b) ts 07:29 area — prior_designs verify item (required: true) was never asked despite Charlotte's neighbor-influence disclosure being the natural opening. Both are hard-required verify items with zero coverage in the current Stage 3 output. Secondary (non-blocking) fixes: correct the 'immediately pivots' characterization at rep_intent.evidence[1] (03:24) — a rapport exchange did occur before the pivot; and add a note in handoff_brief or cherry_pick_moments that Charlotte's 'I have no idea what my credit score is' at 02:37 is the ambiguous credit-qualifier case the schema flags as requiring Kenny's policy resolution (neither DQ nor pass — the exact edge case the schema's spencer_operator_note addresses).
